809],[320,533,1776547284852],[320,532,1776547284869],[319,532,1776547284883],[318,531,1776547284916],[317,531,1776547284941],[317,530,1776547284951],[316,530,1776547284987],[316,530,1776547285204],[317,530,1776547285218],[319,530,1776547285229],[322,531,1776547285244],[324,531,1776547285255],[327,531,1776547285266],[329,531,1776547285280],[330,531,1776547285294],[331,531,1776547285308],[332,531,1776547285334],[333,531,1776547285361],[334,531,1776547285380],[335,531,1776547285417],[336,531,1776547285436],[336,531,1776547285476],[337,532,1776547285482],[338,532,1776547285504],[339,533,1776547285550],[340,533,1776547285562],[340,534,1776547285582],[341,534,1776547285592],[342,534,1776547285610],[342,535,1776547285632],[343,535,1776547285646],[343,535,1776547285654],[342,535,1776547285664],[341,535,1776547285686],[340,536,1776547285706]],"mm-mp":19.01890359168242,"md":[[336,532,1776547285468]],"md-mp":4605.0,"mu":[[336,532,1776547285649]],"mu-mp":4632.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
